name: alpine-language-tools
description: Alpine.js Language Tools monorepo (VS Code extension + Language Server + core).

scripts.test: pnpm -r run build && pnpm -r run test
scripts.test:unit: pnpm -r run build && pnpm -r run test:unit
scripts.vsix: pnpm --filter alpine-language-tools run vsix && pnpm --filter alpine-language-tools exec vsce package --no-dependencies --out ../../dist
